'''鈭歞h-m-n''' ('''kadhaman''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nauseate|nauseate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-m-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nauseate|nauseate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-m-n
|-
! Lemma
| kadhaman
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhaman|thidhaman]] || [[word:jidhaman|jidhaman]] || [[word:shidhaman|shidhaman]] || [[word:kidhaman|kidhaman]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhaman|thuthudhaman]] || [[word:jujudhaman|jujudhaman]] || [[word:shushudhaman|shushudhaman]] || [[word:kukudhaman|kukudhaman]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhaman|thudhaman]] || [[word:judhaman|judhaman]] || [[word:shudhaman|shudhaman]] || [[word:kudhaman|kudhaman]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhaman|thudhaman]] || [[word:judhaman|judhaman]] || [[word:shudhaman|shudhaman]] || [[word:kudhaman|kudhaman]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhaman|thedhaman]] || [[word:jedhaman|jedhaman]] || [[word:shedhaman|shedhaman]] || [[word:kedhaman|kedhaman]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhaman|thothodhaman]] || [[word:jojodhaman|jojodhaman]] || [[word:shoshodhaman|shoshodhaman]] || [[word:kokodhaman|kokodhaman]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhaman|thodhaman]] || [[word:jodhaman|jodhaman]] || [[word:shodhaman|shodhaman]] || [[word:kodhaman|kodhaman]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhaman|thodhaman]] || [[word:jodhaman|jodhaman]] || [[word:shodhaman|shodhaman]] || [[word:kodhaman|kodhaman]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhaman|dhaman]] || [[word:dhaman|dhaman]] || [[word:dhaman|dhaman]] || [[word:dhaman|dhaman]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhaman|dhaman]] || [[word:dhaman|dhaman]] || [[word:dhaman|dhaman]] || [[word:dhaman|dhaman]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhaman|dhaman]] || [[word:dhaman|dhaman]] || [[word:dhaman|dhaman]] || [[word:dhaman|dhaman]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhaman|dhaman]] || [[word:dhaman|dhaman]] || [[word:dhaman|dhaman]] || [[word:dhaman|dhaman]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhaman|th忙dhaman]] || [[word:j忙dhaman|j忙dhaman]] || [[word:sh忙dhaman|sh忙dhaman]] || [[word:k忙dhaman|k忙dhaman]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhaman|thathadhaman]] || [[word:jajadhaman|jajadhaman]] || [[word:shashadhaman|shashadhaman]] || [[word:kakadhaman|kakadhaman]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhaman|thadhaman]] || [[word:jadhaman|jadhaman]] || [[word:shadhaman|shadhaman]] || [[word:kadhaman|kadhaman]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhaman|thadhaman]] || [[word:jadhaman|jadhaman]] || [[word:shadhaman|shadhaman]] || [[word:kadhaman|kadhaman]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhaman|shadhaman]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhaman|goshadhaman]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhaman|gokishadhaman]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhamann眉|shadhamann眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhamannkn眉|goshadhamannkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhamann眉|gokishadhamann眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhamansh毛|shadhamansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhamannksh毛|goshadhamannksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhamansh毛|gokishadhamansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhamanro|shadhamanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhamannkro|goshadhamannkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhamanro|gokishadhamanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhamanmu|shadhamanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhamannkmu|goshadhamannkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhamanmu|gokishadhamanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhamansher|shadhamansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhamannksher|goshadhamannksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhamansher|gokishadhamansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhamanng|shadhamanng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhamannkng|goshadhamannkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhamanng|gokishadhamanng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhamanya|shadhamanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhamannkya|goshadhamannkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhamanya|gokishadhamanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhamanyam|shadhamanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhamannkyam|goshadhamannkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhamanyam|gokishadhamanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhamann眉sh毛|shadhamann眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhamannkn眉sh毛|goshadhamannkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhamann眉sh毛|gokishadhamann眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhamann眉ro|shadhamann眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhamannkn眉ro|goshadhamannkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhamann眉ro|gokishadhamann眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhamann眉mu|shadhamann眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhamannkn眉mu|goshadhamannkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhamann眉mu|gokishadhamann眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhamansh毛n眉|shadhamansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhamannksh毛n眉|goshadhamannksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhamansh毛n眉|gokishadhamansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhamansh毛ro|shadhamansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhamannksh毛ro|goshadhamannksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhamansh毛ro|gokishadhamansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhamansh毛mu|shadhamansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhamannksh毛mu|goshadhamannksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhamansh毛mu|gokishadhamansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhamanron眉|shadhamanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhamannkron眉|goshadhamannkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhamanron眉|gokishadhamanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhamanrosh毛|shadhamanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhamannkrosh毛|goshadhamannkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhamanrosh毛|gokishadhamanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhamanromu|shadhamanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhamannkromu|goshadhamannkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhamanromu|gokishadhamanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhamanmun眉|shadhamanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhamannkmun眉|goshadhamannkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhamanmun眉|gokishadhamanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhamanmush毛|shadhamanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhamannkmush毛|goshadhamannkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhamanmush毛|gokishadhamanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhamanmuro|shadhamanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhamannkmuro|goshadhamannkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhamanmuro|gokishadhamanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
